calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. Court ordered Monetary Sanctions issued on March 14, 2017 and July 12, 2017 vacated. Clerk to prepare an order. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of counsel for Plaintiff. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Continued To Sep-12-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Sep-12-2017 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Jul-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400,00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to July 11, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
